jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
